mapper.sql: A.RSS_ID AS rssId , A.TRGET_SVC_NM AS trgetSvcNm , A.TRGET_SVC_TABLE AS trgetSvcTable , A.HDER_TITLE AS hderTitle , A.HDER_LINK AS hderLink , A.FRST_REGISTER_ID AS frstRegisterId , TO_CHAR(A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS frstRegisterPnttm
mapper.select: SELECT FROM TB_RSS A ORDER BY A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM DESC LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}
